prompt: Create a cinematic before-and-after transformation diptych featuring an adult woman in ancient Chinese fantasy styling. Canvas: horizontal 4:3 image split vertically into exactly 2 equal panels with a clean center seam. Left panel: write the pink handwritten label “Before” in the upper left; show the woman seated in a dark wooden pavilion, wearing a flowing white hanfu with translucent veils, gold embroidery, and an elegant silver hair crown, with long black hair and a decorative sword leaning diagonally along her left side; the mood is solemn wuxia fantasy, with mountains and traditional architecture softly visible in the background. Right panel: write the pink handwritten label “After” in the upper right; show the same woman transformed into a softer pink floral hanfu look with a pink choker, layered robe, embroidered sash, flower hair ornaments, and long black hair styled with loose volume; she poses playfully with both hands making V-signs near her cheeks. Add exactly 1 thick curved pink arrow across the top center pointing from the left panel to the right panel. Cover the face in each panel with an opaque rectangular censor block in muted brown, exactly 2 censor rectangles total, while keeping the hair, outfit, pose, and body visible. Visual style: realistic high-detail cosplay photography, warm indoor sunlight, shallow depth of field, soft filmic color grading, ornate historical Chinese room details, polished fantasy costume textures, no extra text besides the two labels. Customizable subject details: ancient fantasy heroine, white, pink, Before, After.
